title: Bravo Just Dropped the first full “Real Housewives of Rhode Island” Trailer. Here’s everything we learned.
author: Lauren Daley
bullets: 'The Real Housewives of Rhode Island' premieres on Bravo April 2 at 9 p.m.
The show features Alicia Carmody, a Providence resident, and Liz McGraw, a cannabis business owner in the state.
RHORI explores relationships within Rhode Island's close-knit social scene, highlighting friendships, feuds, and loyalties.

title: Hampden County Sheriff plans dozens of job cuts
author: Morgan Rousseau
bullets: Hampden County Sheriff's Department to cut 50 jobs, saving up to $4 million after $26.5 million budget reduction.
Sheriff Nick Cocchi announces cuts will reduce patrols in Springfield, West Springfield, Holyoke, and Palmer.
Layoffs linked to long-term structural funding issues, not overspending, stemming from legislative practices post-1999.

title: Quincy approves money for new firefighting gear after PFAS found in old gear
author: Morgan Rousseau
bullets: Quincy officials approved $2.65 million to replace firefighters' gear containing PFAS, linked to cancer and health risks.
The new funding will provide over 270 Quincy firefighters with two sets of PFAS-free protective gear each.
The decision follows concerns about PFAS, hazardous 'forever chemicals', and pressures from firefighters and residents.

title: With his new doc  ‘Henry David Thoreau,’ Don Henley returns to Walden
author: Lauren Daley
bullets: Don Henley, co-founder of The Eagles, executive produced the 'Henry David Thoreau' documentary, airing March 30 and 31 on PBS.
Henley founded The Walden Woods Project in 1990 to preserve Walden Woods against commercial development near Concord, Massachusetts.
The documentary features narrations by George Clooney, Jeff Goldblum, Ted Danson, and Meryl Streep, exploring Thoreau's impact and philosophy.

title: World Cup friendly match at Gillette was an ‘amazing’ off-day field trip for the Celtics
author: Khari A. Thompson
bullets: The Boston Celtics attended a friendly soccer match between France and Brazil at Gillette Stadium on Thursday.
Celtics rookie Hugo Gonzalez traded jerseys with France star Kylian Mbappe, who scored in France's 2-1 win.
Coach Joe Mazzulla noted similarities between soccer and basketball, emphasizing possession and counterattack strategies.

title: Payton Pritchard’s huge night leads short-handed Celtics over streaking Hawks: 7 takeaways
author: Tom Westerholm
bullets: Payton Pritchard scored a game-high 36 points, leading the Celtics to a 109-102 win over the Hawks.
Jayson Tatum played 36 minutes, contributing 25 points and 12 rebounds, despite continuing to regain his shooting rhythm.
Jordan Walsh returned to action, providing defensive versatility and scoring five points with notable defensive contributions.

title: Why did Jayson Tatum come back this season? The Celtics’ success had ‘a lot’ to do with it.
author: Khari A. Thompson
bullets: Jayson Tatum returned to the Celtics this season after recovering from a ruptured Achilles' tendon surgery.
Tatum's decision to return was influenced by the Celtics' strong performance and championship contention.
Since returning, Tatum is averaging 9.2 rebounds per game, though his shooting percentages are below career averages.

title: Police: Man killed in Lowell apartment complex shooting
author: Morgan Rousseau
bullets: A man died following a shooting at a Lowell apartment complex on Pawtucket Boulevard Friday afternoon.
The incident occurred after a brief altercation between two armed men who knew each other.
The Middlesex DA’s Office, Massachusetts State Police, and Lowell Police are investigating the case.

title: Report: Connecticut Sun to relocate to Houston with purchase by Rockets owners
author: Kaley Brown
bullets: Connecticut Sun will relocate to Houston in 2027 after acquisition by the Fertitta family, owners of the Houston Rockets.
The WNBA franchise's sale for $300 million is a record, with plans to rename the team the Houston Comets.
Steve Pagliuca's attempted $325 million acquisition to move the Sun to Boston was blocked by the WNBA last summer.

title: 5 must-watch movies & TV shows streaming right now
author: Kevin Slane
bullets: 'Daredevil: Born Again' Season 2 features Charlie Cox and streams on Disney+.
'From the World of John Wick: Ballerina' starring Ana de Armas streams on HBO Max.
'Mike & Nick & Nick & Alice' is a time travel comedy with Vince Vaughn, streaming on Hulu.
